adversarial.description: Beyond re-running all 9 contract verifications to EXIT:0: (E01) anti-vacuity confirms the phase base 964fe48 had ecosystem/07 at 0.1.1 with four transition classes and no persisting/3.1/3.2/6.1; (E05) the acceptance test is exercised against the REAL audit-044 corpus -- all five findings map to an amended class (015 persisting, 002 pre-window-resolved, 016 stale, 017/018 new) and the open-only score is 2->4 with the resolved 002 excluded, so the delta the committed run bridged via unchanged_facts is now derivable directly from the taxonomy; (E06) the committed audit-2026-07-17-cba6422 artifacts are proven byte-identical to the base (immutability, AH-3). The persisting/stale duality was checked to be exhaustive-and-exclusive for a present-on-both finding (evidence current -> persisting; stale -> stale).
adversarial.process_note: Single-session collapsed-role execution, disclosed-and-permitted by the AGF Orchestrator clause. E09 dogfoods the NDEBT-019 rc-capture rule. The amendment binds future comparisons only; no committed audit artifact is mutated. E01/E07 anchor to the phase base 964fe48 because the operator-authorized re-baseline commit 085e568 sits between the base and this deliverable.

evidence_bundle_check.diff_patch_reasoning: .agent/evidence/057/diff.patch is `git diff 964fe48..HEAD` at the deliverable; E07 independently re-asserts the non-.agent changes are exactly the three contracted files.

acceptance_reconciliation.summary: The single acceptance test -- 'the amended protocol classifies the audit-044 corpus without recourse to unchanged_facts workarounds; version bump + change_log per NDS Sec 7' -- maps to: classifies the corpus -> E05 (all five findings map to an amended class; open-only 2->4; the doc defines every class used) + E02/E03/E04 (the persisting class, the 3.1/3.2 rules, and the 6.1 semantics that make those classifications possible); version bump + change_log -> E08 (ecosystem/07 0.2.0 with a matching change_log). E06 additionally proves the committed corpus stays immutable while the LIVE protocol is amended.

non_blocking_observations: OPERATOR-SELECTED FEATURE + RE-BASELINE (disclosed): the operator directed 'Rebase line approved' + 'Option 1', authorizing a Section-6/9 scope-budget re-baseline (original_estimate_lines 1720 -> 2300, ceiling 2236 -> 2990; recorded structurally in scope_budget.rebaselines in the separate commit 085e568) and selecting feature 057. So 057 is operator-chosen, not abort-driven.

SCOPE ~ON ESTIMATE: 90 actual ins+del vs 80 estimated (+12.5%); no meaningful flag (well under the 3x-rolling: last-3 avg 053=221/055=282/054=74 = 192, 3x=577). Cumulative 1858/2990 = 62.1% of the re-baselined ceiling.

LIVE-DOC AMENDMENT, COMMITTED CORPUS IMMUTABLE: the amendment binds FUTURE comparisons; the committed audit-2026-07-17-cba6422 delta/findings/report are untouched (E06). NDEBT-022 was Medium severity precisely because it was a spec-completeness gap that would recur, not a concealment -- the committed delta was correct and fully traceable via its transparent unchanged_facts + prose bridge.

PR #35 REVIEW ROUND (disclosed, addressed): CodeRabbit raised 4 Major findings, all valid, all fixed in 95f3cc2 + re-captured evidence. Verification rigor: E01 now checks every claimed section-absence at base; E05 (the acceptance test) DERIVES all five classifications + the open-only 2->4 scores from the corpus+delta rather than hardcoding; E07 dot-anchors the .agent/ filter. Taxonomy: `new`/`reopened` are now mutually exclusive (a previously-resolved finding that reappears is `reopened` only), closing an exactly-one-class overlap E05 could not catch (audit-044 has no reopened case). Verdict unchanged (9/9).

final_verdict.summary: Feature 057 APPROVED. All 9 contract verifications re-run to EXIT:0. ecosystem/07_progress_comparison.md 0.2.0 completes the finding-state taxonomy: the fifth `persisting` class (Section 3), the pre-window-resolved recording rule (3.1), the first-comparison rule (3.2), and the open-only score-count semantics (6.1). The real audit-044 corpus classifies directly (015 persisting, 002 pre-window-resolved, 016 stale, 017/018 new; open-only 2->4) without the unchanged_facts workaround the committed delta used, and that committed corpus stays immutable. DEBT 0.26.0 (NDEBT-022 Resolved). Sweep 13/13, payload 11/11, self-test 46/46, e2e green. Operator-selected feature under the authorized re-baseline.
